Short CV

Gamzenur KARAGÖZ was born in İstanbul in 1999. She graduated from Akdeniz University Faculty of Medicine in 2023. At the end of 2023, Gamzenur KARAGÖZ, who started to work as a Research Assistant at Üsküdar University Faculty of Medicine, Department of Mental Health and Diseases, continues her medical specialization in the field of Psychiatry.
